mechanics.excerpt: Priority transmissions can be sent more quickly, but at a significantly high- er cost because the stations that pass the message must be aligned correctly: its currency; at the time of the ast revision in 3060 the denom inations were 10 and 20 yen coins (copper alloy); 50 yen 1 ryu and ryu coins (silver alloy); and 10_ 100 and 500 ryu notes The 000 and 10,000 ryu notes used before 3060 are rare but they remain legal tender in the Combine.
